hero.title: Designing <highlight>Beautiful UIs</highlight> That Are <highlight>Actually Shippable</highlight>
hero.description: As a UI/UX Designer with a Frontend background, I bridge the gap between pixels and production. My designs are not just concepts—they are technically feasible from API flows to component logic—so your team hands off less and ships faster.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Developer Background, Designer Mindset
about.bio: I started as a frontend developer before transitioning into UI/UX design. This background gives me a unique perspective — I design with technical constraints in mind, create feasible component structures, and communicate effectively with engineering teams. My focus is on building products that are not just beautiful, but scalable and practical.
